notes: PERSONA: A Reproducible Testbed for Pluralistic Alignment (SynthLabs + Stanford, arXiv 2407.17387). 1,586 personas procedurally generated from US Census ACS PUMS microdata, plus 3,868 prompts and 317,200 persona-conditioned feedback pairs. Each persona has 33 attributes: ACS-derived demographics (age, sex, race, ancestry, household language, education, employment status, class of worker, industry, occupation, detailed job description, income, marital status, household type, family presence/age, place of birth, citizenship, veteran status, disability, health insurance, cognitive/vision/hearing difficulty, ability to speak English, fertility) plus idiosyncratic/psychodemographic fields (big five scores, defining quirks, mannerisms, personal time, lifestyle, ideology, political views, religion). GATED: accept terms at the HF dataset page and set HF_TOKEN before fetching. License cc-by-nc-sa-4.0 (non-commercial + share-alike) is restrictive (same caveat as Tencent PersonaHub); curate the attribute schema only and confirm redistribution rights before committing any raw data (DATASHEET TODO).
